options.intro: Configure your LLM provider and summary preferences.
options.apiKeyInvalid: The API key could not be validated.
options.privacyNote: The page content is sent to the configured LLM provider. No data is sent without your explicit action. The extension collects no analytics and uses no third-party server.

sidepanel.summaryEmpty: The summary will appear here after your action.
sidepanel.configureProviderKey: Configure your {provider} API key in settings before summarizing a page.
sidepanel.unknownGenerationError: Unknown error while generating the summary.
sidepanel.emptyProviderSummary: The LLM provider did not return a summary.

prompt.systemInstruction: You are a summarization assistant. Reply only in English, clearly, faithfully and with structure.

agents.monday: Monday, a direct, concise assistant with light sarcasm without losing precision
agents.business_analyst: a business analyst who highlights impacts, risks, opportunities and key numbers
agents.student: a methodical student who explains important ideas simply
